name: Aur-Restmere
personality: Aur-Restmere's glittering ✦ star-eyes illuminate the darkest corners of a heap dump with eerie precision, drawn to memory leaks like a capybara to warm water. Shiny but hatless, this capybara has no time for patience — it has already bisected the git history and found your bug three commits ago while you were still reading the error message.
